description:
Your next-level handles start here. Kyrie AI is the AI-powered ball-handling coach that lives in your phone — scoring your dribbling, building your daily training plan, and coaching you through every drill with real-time camera feedback.

Most players practice hard but don't know what to work on. Kyrie AI fixes that by analyzing your ball handling from the start and giving you a Ball Handler Score with a clear picture of exactly where you need to improve.

Every day, the app generates a personalized workout built around your weakest skills. Sessions rotate through crossovers, combos, control drills, speed work, and more — so you're always training what matters most, not just running the same routine.

Real-time feedback is what sets Kyrie AI apart. On-device hand-pose analysis uses your phone's camera to track your reps as you do them — no wearables, no extra equipment, just your phone and a ball.

Progress is visible and motivating. Your Ball Handler Score climbs through tiers as your skills improve, and streak tracking, total XP, and session history keep you accountable. Hit the daily challenge for bonus XP and a reason to show up every single day.

Kyrie AI Pro unlocks the full coaching experience — all drill modes, your personalized daily plan, and everything you need to seriously level up your game. Start with a free 3-day trial on the yearly plan and see what consistent, AI-guided training can do for your handles.

Download Kyrie AI today and get your first session in.
